
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>Sojourner — News That Follows People</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;0,900;1,400;1,700&family=Source+Serif+4:ital,opsz,wght@0,8..60,300;0,8..60,400;0,8..60,600;1,8..60,300;1,8..60,400&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --navy: #1a2355;
    --navy-deep: #0f1635;
    --navy-mid: #243070;
    --orange: #f5a623;
    --orange-light: #ffbe55;
    --orange-pale: #fff8ec;
    --white: #ffffff;
    --off-white: #fafaf8;
    --gray-light: #f2f0ec;
    --gray-mid: #b8b5ae;
    --gray-dark: #6b6860;
    --text: #1c1b18;
    --text-soft: #4a4845;
    --border: #e8e5de;
  }
  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
  body { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; background: var(--white); color: var(--text); overflow-x: hidden; }

  /* ── NAVIGATION ── */
  nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 1000;
    background: var(--white);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 0 3rem; height: 68px;
    box-shadow: 0 1px 12px rgba(26,35,85,0.06);
  }
  .nav-logo { display: flex; align-items: center; text-decoration: none; }
  .nav-logo img { height: 40px; width: auto; }
  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; align-items: center; }
  .nav-links a {
    color: var(--text-soft); text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover, .nav-links a.active { color: var(--navy); }
  .nav-cta {
    background: var(--navy) !important; color: var(--white) !important;
    padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem; border-radius: 3px; font-weight: 600 !important;
    transition: background 0.2s !important;
  }
  .nav-cta:hover { background: var(--navy-mid) !important; }

  /* ── PAGE SYSTEM ── */
  .page { display: none; padding-top: 68px; min-height: 100vh; }
  .page.active { display: block; }

  /* ── HERO ── */
  .hero {
    background: var(--white);
    padding: 5rem 3rem 4.5rem;
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 5rem; align-items: center;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto;
  }
  .hero-eyebrow {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem;
    color: var(--orange); font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }
  .hero-eyebrow::before { content: ''; width: 28px; height: 2px; background: var(--orange); }
  .hero h1 {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    color: var(--navy-deep); font-size: clamp(2.6rem, 4.5vw, 3.8rem);
    line-height: 1.12; font-weight: 900; margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
    letter-spacing: -0.01em;
  }
  .hero h1 em { color: var(--orange); font-style: italic; }
  .hero-desc {
    color: var(--text-soft); font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif;
    font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.75; margin-bottom: 2rem;
  }
  .hero-btns { display: flex; gap: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--navy); color: var(--white);
    padding: 0.8rem 1.75rem; border-radius: 3px;
    font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.82rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase;
    text-decoration: none; border: none; cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.15s; display: inline-block;
  }
  .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--navy-mid); transform: translateY(-1px); }
  .btn-outline {
    background: transparent; color: var(--navy);
    padding: 0.78rem 1.75rem; border-radius: 3px;
    font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.82rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase;
    text-decoration: none; border: 2px solid var(--navy); cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s; display: inline-block;
  }
  .btn-outline:hover { background: var(--navy); color: var(--white); }

  /* Hero card */
  .hero-card {
    border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden;
    cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
    background: var(--white);
  }
  .hero-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 16px 40px rgba(26,35,85,0.1); }
  .hero-card-img {
    width: 100%; height: 200px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--navy-deep) 0%, var(--navy-mid) 100%);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 900;
    color: var(--orange); text-align: center; line-height: 1.2;
  }
  .hero-card-body { padding: 1.5rem; }
  .hero-card-tag { color: var(--orange); font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .hero-card-title { color: var(--navy-deep); font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.35; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .hero-card-meta { color: var(--gray-dark); font-size: 0.75rem; }

  /* ── TICKER ── */
  .ticker-bar {
    background: var(--navy-deep); padding: 0.6rem 3rem;
    display: flex; gap: 2.5rem; overflow: hidden; align-items: center;
  }
  .ticker-label { font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--orange); letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; white-space: nowrap; }
  .ticker-item { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 400; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); white-space: nowrap; }
  .ticker-divider { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25); font-size: 0.7rem; }

  /* ── SECTION COMMON ── */
  .section { padding: 4rem 3rem; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .section-wrapper { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
  .section-label {
    color: var(--orange); font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem; margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  }
  .section-label::before { content: ''; width: 24px; height: 2px; background: var(--orange); }
  .section-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2rem); font-weight: 900; color: var(--navy-deep); line-height: 1.2; }

  /* ── FEATURED GRID ── */
  .featured-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 1.5rem; margin-top: 2.5rem; }
  .article-card {
    background: var(--white); border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
    cursor: pointer; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
    text-decoration: none; color: inherit;
  }
  .article-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(26,35,85,0.09); border-color: #ccc; }
  .card-img {
    width: 100%; height: 160px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 900;
  }
  .card-img.feature { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--navy-deep), var(--navy-mid)); color: var(--orange); }
  .card-img.news { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2d1b6e, #1a0d4a); color: #c4b5fd; }
  .card-img.editorial { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7c2d12, #431407); color: var(--orange-light); }
  .card-img.culture { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #064e3b, #022c22); color: #6ee7b7; }
  .card-img.opinion { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1e3a5f, #0c1f35); color: #93c5fd; }
  .card-img.campus { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4a1d96, #2e1065); color: #f0abfc; }
  .card-body { padding: 1.25rem; flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
  .card-category { color: var(--orange); font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .card-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.35; margin-bottom: 0.6rem; color: var(--navy-deep); }
  .card-excerpt { font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--text-soft); line-height: 1.6; flex: 1; }
  .card-meta { margin-top: 1rem; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; }
  .card-author { font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--gray-dark); font-weight: 500; }
  .card-date { font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--gray-mid); }

  /* ── ABOUT STRIP ── */
  .about-strip {
    background: var(--navy-deep); color: var(--white);
    padding: 4rem 3rem;
  }
  .about-strip-inner { max-width: 760px; margin: 0 auto; text-align: center; }
  .about-strip h2 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 900; margin-bottom: 1.25rem; line-height: 1.2; }
  .about-strip h2 span { color: var(--orange); }
  .about-strip p { font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); line-height: 1.8; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; font-size: 1rem; }

  /* ── CATEGORY TABS ── */
  .cat-tabs { display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
  .cat-tab {
    padding: 0.45rem 1.1rem; border-radius: 2px;
    font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;
    border: 2px solid var(--border); background: transparent; cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.15s; color: var(--text-soft);
  }
  .cat-tab.active, .cat-tab:hover { border-color: var(--orange); color: var(--orange); background: var(--orange-pale); }

  /* ── ARTICLE VIEW ── */
  .article-page { max-width: 720px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 3rem 2rem 5rem; }
  .article-back {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;
    color: var(--navy); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;
    text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; margin-bottom: 2rem;
    border: none; background: none;
  }
  .article-back:hover { color: var(--orange); }
  .article-category { color: var(--orange); font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .article-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: clamp(1.9rem, 4vw, 2.8rem); font-weight: 900;
    line-height: 1.12; color: var(--navy-deep); margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .article-meta {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem;
    padding-bottom: 1.5rem; border-bottom: 3px solid var(--orange);
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
  }
  .article-meta-author { font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--navy); }
  .article-meta-date { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--gray-dark); }
  .article-meta-dot { width: 4px; height: 4px; background: var(--orange); border-radius: 50%; }
  .article-header-img {
    width: 100%; height: 300px; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden;
    margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 900;
  }
  .article-body { font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.85; color: var(--text); }
  .article-body p { margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
  .article-body blockquote {
    border-left: 4px solid var(--orange); margin: 2rem 0;
    padding: 1rem 1.5rem; background: var(--orange-pale);
    font-style: italic; font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--navy);
  }
  .article-body h3 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 700; margin: 2rem 0 1rem; color: var(--navy-deep); }

  /* ── CONTACT ── */
  .contact-page { max-width: 640px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 4rem 2rem; }
  .contact-page h1 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 2.4rem; font-weight: 900; color: var(--navy-deep); margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .contact-page h1 span { color: var(--orange); }
  .contact-page .tagline { font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; color: var(--text-soft); font-size: 1rem; margin-bottom: 3rem; line-height: 1.6; }
  .contact-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1rem; margin-bottom: 2.5rem; }
  .contact-card {
    background: var(--white); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 1.5rem; text-decoration: none; color: inherit;
    transition: transform 0.15s, border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s;
  }
  .contact-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: var(--orange); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(245,166,35,0.12); }
  .contact-card-icon { font-size: 1.4rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }
  .contact-card-label { font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--orange); margin-bottom: 0.25rem; }
  .contact-card-value { font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--navy-deep); }
  .contact-email-section { background: var(--navy-deep); border-radius: 6px; padding: 2rem; text-align: center; }
  .contact-email-section p { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65); font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }
  .contact-email-section a { color: var(--orange); font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none; }
  .contact-email-section a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

  /* ── FOOTER ── */
  footer {
    background: var(--navy-deep); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
    padding: 3rem; border-top: 3px solid var(--orange);
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 3rem;
  }
  footer h4 { color: var(--white); font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 0.95rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  footer p { font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.65; }
  footer ul { list-style: none; }
  footer ul li { margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  footer ul li a { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.82rem; transition: color 0.15s; }
  footer ul li a:hover { color: var(--orange); }
  .footer-logo img { height: 36px; width: auto; filter: brightness(0) invert(1); margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }
  .footer-tagline { color: var(--orange); font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; }
  .footer-bottom {
    background: var(--navy-deep); padding: 1.25rem 3rem;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
  }
  .footer-bottom p { font-size: 0.72rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); }

  /* ── ANIMATIONS ── */
  @keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
  .page.active .animate-in { animation: fadeUp 0.5s ease both; }
  .animate-in:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.05s; }
  .animate-in:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.12s; }
  .animate-in:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.19s; }
  .animate-in:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.26s; }
  .animate-in:nth-child(5) { animation-delay: 0.33s; }
  .animate-in:nth-child(6) { animation-delay: 0.40s; }

  /* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 2.5rem; padding: 3rem 1.5rem; }
    .hero-featured { display: none; }
    .featured-grid, .works-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    nav { padding: 0 1.5rem; }
    .section { padding: 3rem 1.5rem; }
    footer { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 2rem; padding: 2rem 1.5rem; }
    .about-strip { padding: 3rem 1.5rem; }
    .contact-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  }
  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    .featured-grid, .works-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .nav-links a:not(.nav-cta) { display: none; }
  }
</style><nav>
  <a class="nav-logo" href="#" onclick="showPage('home')">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Sojourner" style="height:40px;width:auto;">
  </a>
  <div class="nav-links">
    <a href="#" onclick="showPage('home')" id="nav-home" class="active">Home</a>
    <a href="#" onclick="showPage('works')" id="nav-works">Works</a>
    <a href="#" onclick="showPage('contact')" id="nav-contact">Contact</a>
    <a href="#" onclick="showPage('contact')" class="nav-cta">Get in Touch</a>
  </div>
</nav>
</head>
<body>



<!-- ══════ HOME PAGE ══════ -->
<div id="page-home" class="page active">

  <section class="hero">
    <div>
      <div class="hero-eyebrow">News That Follows People</div>
      <h1>Stories that <em>matter.</em><br>Told with purpose.</h1>
      <p class="hero-desc">Sojourner is a student-led publication from Bulacan State University — committed to creative, courageous, and human-centered journalism.</p>
      <div class="hero-btns">
        <a class="btn-primary" href="#" onclick="showPage('works')">View Our Work</a>
        <a class="btn-outline" href="#" onclick="showPage('contact')">Get in Touch</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-featured">
      <div class="hero-card" onclick="openArticle('drag-race')">
        <div class="hero-card-img">Fifi's<br>Drag Race</div>
        <div class="hero-card-body">
          <div class="hero-card-tag">Entertainment &amp; Culture</div>
          <div class="hero-card-title">Fifi's Drag Race Season 4: Celebration of Artistry, Inclusivity, and Fierce Self-Expression</div>
          <div class="hero-card-meta">By Princess Louise Gonzales · October 21, 2025</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <div class="ticker-bar">
    <span class="ticker-label">Latest</span>
    <span class="ticker-item">Fifi's Drag Race Season 4 Wraps with a Bang</span>
    <span class="ticker-divider">·</span>
    <span class="ticker-item">BSU Broadcasting Students Shine on Stage</span>
    <span class="ticker-divider">·</span>
    <span class="ticker-item">Editorial: On the Value of Student Journalism</span>
    <span class="ticker-divider">·</span>
    <span class="ticker-item">Radio Aguman Returns to the Airwaves</span>
  </div>

  <div class="section-wrapper">
    <div class="section">
      <div class="section-label">Our Work</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Featured Articles</h2>
      <div class="featured-grid">
        <div class="article-card animate-in" onclick="openArticle('drag-race')">
          <div class="card-img feature">DRAG</div>
          <div class="card-body">
            <div class="card-category">Entertainment &amp; Culture</div>
            <div class="card-title">Fifi's Drag Race Season 4: Celebration of Artistry, Inclusivity, and Fierce Self-Expression</div>
            <div class="card-excerpt">Extraordinary, colorful showcases filled the venue with confidence, glamour, and fierce performances.</div>
            <div class="card-meta"><span class="card-author">Princess Louise Gonzales</span><span class="card-date">Oct 21, 2025</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="article-card animate-in" onclick="openArticle('student-press')">
          <div class="card-img news">PRESS</div>
          <div class="card-body">
            <div class="card-category">News Writing</div>
            <div class="card-title">The Student Press and the Fight for Honest Reporting in Philippine Universities</div>
            <div class="card-excerpt">As campus journalism faces scrutiny, student reporters push back — armed with nothing but truth.</div>
            <div class="card-meta"><span class="card-author">Rafael Magtibay</span><span class="card-date">Sep 10, 2025</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="article-card animate-in" onclick="openArticle('identity')">
          <div class="card-img editorial">VOICE</div>
          <div class="card-body">
            <div class="card-category">Editorial / Opinion</div>
            <div class="card-title">We Are More Than Our Grades: A Plea for Holistic Education</div>
            <div class="card-excerpt">Philippine education measures worth in GWA. But students are not numbers — and it's time our institutions remembered that.</div>
            <div class="card-meta"><span class="card-author">Maria Santos</span><span class="card-date">Aug 5, 2025</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="article-card animate-in" onclick="openArticle('mural')">
          <div class="card-img culture">MURAL</div>
          <div class="card-body">
            <div class="card-category">Feature Article</div>
            <div class="card-title">The Wall Speaks: How Bulacan's Street Murals Tell a City's Untold Stories</div>
            <div class="card-excerpt">Behind every painted wall in Malolos is a community reclaiming its voice, one brushstroke at a time.</div>
            <div class="card-meta"><span class="card-author">Janna Cruz</span><span class="card-date">Jul 19, 2025</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="article-card animate-in" onclick="openArticle('mental-health')">
          <div class="card-img opinion">MIND</div>
          <div class="card-body">
            <div class="card-category">Feature Article</div>
            <div class="card-title">Burnout Is Not a Badge of Honor: Mental Health in BSU's Broadcast Program</div>
            <div class="card-excerpt">Inside the grueling demands of a media course — and the quiet crisis happening off-camera.</div>
            <div class="card-meta"><span class="card-author">Carl Reyes</span><span class="card-date">Jun 30, 2025</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="article-card animate-in" onclick="openArticle('campus-radio')">
          <div class="card-img campus">RADIO</div>
          <div class="card-body">
            <div class="card-category">News Writing</div>
            <div class="card-title">Frequencies of Change: Inside BSU's Revived Campus Radio Station</div>
            <div class="card-excerpt">After two years of silence, the airwaves are back — and a new generation is ready to be heard.</div>
            <div class="card-meta"><span class="card-author">Lea Domingo</span><span class="card-date">May 15, 2025</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="about-strip">
    <div class="about-strip-inner">
      <h2>About <span>Sojourner</span></h2>
      <p>We are a student publication under the Journalism program of Bulacan State University. Sojourner exists to tell the stories that matter — from the campus corridors to the wider world beyond.</p>
      <p>Our name says it all: news that follows people. We go where the stories are, and we bring them back with honesty, craft, and heart.</p>
      <a class="btn-primary" href="#" onclick="showPage('works')" style="text-decoration:none">Browse All Work</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <footer>
    <div>
      <div class="footer-logo"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Sojourner"></div>
      <div class="footer-tagline">News That Follows People</div>
      <p>A student publication by the Journalism students of Bulacan State University.</p>
    </div>
    <div><h4>Navigate</h4><ul>
      <li><a href="#" onclick="showPage('home')">Home</a></li>
      <li><a href="#" onclick="showPage('works')">Works</a></li>
      <li><a href="#" onclick="showPage('contact')">Contact</a></li>
    </ul></div>
    <div><h4>Categories</h4><ul>
      <li><a href="#" onclick="showPage('works');filterWorks('feature',null)">Feature Articles</a></li>
      <li><a href="#" onclick="showPage('works');filterWorks('news',null)">News Writing</a></li>
      <li><a href="#" onclick="showPage('works');filterWorks('editorial',null)">Editorial / Opinion</a></li>
    </ul></div>
  </footer>
  <div class="footer-bottom">
    <p>© 2025 Sojourner. Bulacan State University Journalism Students.</p>
    <p>News That Follows People</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════ WORKS PAGE ══════ -->
<div id="page-works" class="page">
  <div class="section" style="padding-bottom:0">
    <div class="section-label">Portfolio</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Our Works</h2>
    <div class="cat-tabs" style="margin-top:1.5rem">
      <button class="cat-tab active" onclick="filterWorks('all', this)">All</button>
      <button class="cat-tab" onclick="filterWorks('feature', this)">Feature Articles</button>
      <button class="cat-tab" onclick="filterWorks('news', this)">News Writing</button>
      <button class="cat-tab" onclick="filterWorks('editorial', this)">Editorial / Opinion</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="section" style="padding-top:1.5rem">
    <div class="featured-grid" id="works-grid">
      <div class="article-card animate-in" data-category="entertainment" onclick="openArticle('drag-race')">
        <div class="card-img feature">DRAG</div>
        <div class="card-body">
          <div class="card-category">Entertainment &amp; Culture</div>
          <div class="card-title">Fifi's Drag Race Season 4: Celebration of Artistry, Inclusivity, and Fierce Self-Expression</div>
          <div class="card-excerpt">Extraordinary, colorful showcases filled the venue with confidence, glamour, and fierce performances.</div>
          <div class="card-meta"><span class="card-author">Princess Louise Gonzales</span><span class="card-date">Oct 21, 2025</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="article-card animate-in" data-category="feature" onclick="openArticle('mural')">
        <div class="card-img culture">MURAL</div>
        <div class="card-body">
          <div class="card-category">Feature Article</div>
          <div class="card-title">The Wall Speaks: How Bulacan's Street Murals Tell a City's Untold Stories</div>
          <div class="card-excerpt">Behind every painted wall in Malolos is a community reclaiming its voice, one brushstroke at a time.</div>
          <div class="card-meta"><span class="card-author">Janna Cruz</span><span class="card-date">Jul 19, 2025</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="article-card animate-in" data-category="feature" onclick="openArticle('mental-health')">
        <div class="card-img opinion">MIND</div>
        <div class="card-body">
          <div class="card-category">Feature Article</div>
          <div class="card-title">Burnout Is Not a Badge of Honor: Mental Health in BSU's Broadcast Program</div>
          <div class="card-excerpt">Inside the grueling demands of a media course — and the quiet crisis happening off-camera.</div>
          <div class="card-meta"><span class="card-author">Carl Reyes</span><span class="card-date">Jun 30, 2025</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="article-card animate-in" data-category="news" onclick="openArticle('student-press')">
        <div class="card-img news">PRESS</div>
        <div class="card-body">
          <div class="card-category">News Writing</div>
          <div class="card-title">The Student Press and the Fight for Honest Reporting in Philippine Universities</div>
          <div class="card-excerpt">As campus journalism faces scrutiny, student reporters push back — armed with nothing but truth.</div>
          <div class="card-meta"><span class="card-author">Rafael Magtibay</span><span class="card-date">Sep 10, 2025</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="article-card animate-in" data-category="news" onclick="openArticle('campus-radio')">
        <div class="card-img campus">RADIO</div>
        <div class="card-body">
          <div class="card-category">News Writing</div>
          <div class="card-title">Frequencies of Change: Inside BSU's Revived Campus Radio Station</div>
          <div class="card-excerpt">After two years of silence, the airwaves are back — and a new generation is ready to be heard.</div>
          <div class="card-meta"><span class="card-author">Lea Domingo</span><span class="card-date">May 15, 2025</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="article-card animate-in" data-category="editorial" onclick="openArticle('identity')">
        <div class="card-img editorial">VOICE</div>
        <div class="card-body">
          <div class="card-category">Editorial / Opinion</div>
          <div class="card-title">We Are More Than Our Grades: A Plea for Holistic Education</div>
          <div class="card-excerpt">Philippine education measures worth in GWA. But students are not numbers.</div>
          <div class="card-meta"><span class="card-author">Maria Santos</span><span class="card-date">Aug 5, 2025</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <footer>
    <div><div class="footer-logo"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Sojourner"></div><div class="footer-tagline">News That Follows People</div><p>Bulacan State University Broadcasting Students.</p></div>
    <div><h4>Navigate</h4><ul><li><a href="#" onclick="showPage('home')">Home</a></li><li><a href="#" onclick="showPage('works')">Works</a></li><li><a href="#" onclick="showPage('contact')">Contact</a></li></ul></div>
    <div><h4>Categories</h4><ul><li><a href="#">Feature Articles</a></li><li><a href="#">News Writing</a></li><li><a href="#">Editorial / Opinion</a></li></ul></div>
  </footer>
  <div class="footer-bottom"><p>© 2025 Sojourner. Bulacan State University.</p><p>News That Follows People</p></div>
</div>

<!-- ══════ ARTICLE PAGE ══════ -->
<div id="page-article" class="page">
  <div class="article-page">
    <button class="article-back" onclick="goBack()">← Back to Works</button>
    <div id="article-content"></div>
  </div>
  <footer>
    <div><div class="footer-logo"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Sojourner"></div><div class="footer-tagline">News That Follows People</div></div>
    <div><h4>Navigate</h4><ul><li><a href="#" onclick="showPage('home')">Home</a></li><li><a href="#" onclick="showPage('works')">Works</a></li><li><a href="#" onclick="showPage('contact')">Contact</a></li></ul></div>
    <div><h4>Read More</h4><ul><li><a href="#" onclick="openArticle('drag-race')">Fifi's Drag Race S4</a></li><li><a href="#" onclick="openArticle('student-press')">The Student Press</a></li><li><a href="#" onclick="openArticle('mural')">The Wall Speaks</a></li></ul></div>
  </footer>
  <div class="footer-bottom"><p>© 2025 Sojourner.</p><p>News That Follows People</p></div>
</div>

<!-- ══════ CONTACT PAGE ══════ -->
<div id="page-contact" class="page">
  <div class="contact-page">
    <div class="section-label" style="margin-bottom:0.75rem">Get in Touch</div>
    <h1>Connect with <span>Sojourner</span></h1>
    <p class="tagline">We're always open to conversations, collaborations, story tips, and feedback. Reach us through any of the channels below.</p>
    <div class="contact-grid">
      <a class="contact-card" href="https://facebook.com" target="_blank">
        <div class="contact-card-icon">📘</div>
        <div class="contact-card-label">Facebook</div>
        <div class="contact-card-value">Sojourner Publication</div>
      </a>
      <a class="contact-card" href="https://instagram.com" target="_blank">
        <div class="contact-card-icon">📸</div>
        <div class="contact-card-label">Instagram</div>
        <div class="contact-card-value">@sojourner_bsu</div>
      </a>
      <a class="contact-card" href="https://linkedin.com" target="_blank">
        <div class="contact-card-icon">💼</div>
        <div class="contact-card-label">LinkedIn</div>
        <div class="contact-card-value">Sojourner BSU</div>
      </a>
      <a class="contact-card" href="https://x.com" target="_blank">
        <div class="contact-card-icon">𝕏</div>
        <div class="contact-card-label">X / Twitter</div>
        <div class="contact-card-value">@sojourner_ph</div>
      </a>
    </div>
    <div class="contact-email-section">
      <p>For pitches, collaborations, or inquiries — send us a message at:</p>
      <a href="mailto:sojourner@bsu.edu.ph">sojourner@bsu.edu.ph</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <footer>
    <div><div class="footer-logo"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Sojourner"></div><div class="footer-tagline">News That Follows People</div><p>Bulacan State University.</p></div>
    <div><h4>Navigate</h4><ul><li><a href="#" onclick="showPage('home')">Home</a></li><li><a href="#" onclick="showPage('works')">Works</a></li><li><a href="#" onclick="showPage('contact')">Contact</a></li></ul></div>
    <div><h4>Socials</h4><ul><li><a href="#">Facebook</a></li><li><a href="#">Instagram</a></li><li><a href="#">LinkedIn</a></li><li><a href="#">X / Twitter</a></li></ul></div>
  </footer>
  <div class="footer-bottom"><p>© 2025 Sojourner. Bulacan State University.</p><p>News That Follows People</p></div>
</div>

<script>
const LOGO_SRC = 'data:image/jpeg;base64,';

// inject logo into all img tags
window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  document.querySelectorAll('img[src="data:image/jpeg;base64,"]').forEach(img => img.src = LOGO_SRC);
});

const articles = {
  'drag-race': {
    category: "Entertainment & Culture", imgClass: "feature", imgText: "Fifi's Drag Race",
    title: "Fifi's Drag Race Season 4: Celebration of Artistry, Inclusivity, and Fierce Self-Expression",
    author: "Princess Louise Gonzales", date: "October 21, 2025",
    body: `<p>Fifi's Drag Race successfully concluded its fourth season, produced by the Broadcasting students from the Hostel of Bulacan State University. The event once again proved to be a vibrant platform for creativity, inclusivity, and empowerment — celebrating the artistry and individuality of every performer who graced the stage.</p><p>Extraordinary, colorful, and dazzling showcases filled the venue with confidence, glamour, and fierce performances. Each contestant brought their unique style and charisma, captivating the audience with stunning looks and exceptional talent. From extravagant lip-sync numbers, every act embodied passion, creativity, and authenticity — the true essence of drag.</p><blockquote>"Hosted by Madam Fifi, the competition highlighted the importance of self-expression and freedom, giving performers the space to shine unapologetically."</blockquote><p>Adding to the excitement, one of the previous season's standout candidates made a special appearance to show support and inspire the new batch of drag artists. The grand finale, held on Friday, October 10, transformed the venue into a dazzling stage of color, energy, and pride.</p><p>The event concluded with a grand awarding ceremony that honored the top performers who impressed the judges with their skill, creativity, and stage presence.</p><p>After weeks of preparation and breathtaking performances, VANILLAUQOE emerged as the new Fifi's Drag Race Season 4 Superstar, marking the end of yet another unforgettable season that celebrated not just drag but the power of being unapologetically yourself.</p>`
  },
  'student-press': {
    category: "News Writing", imgClass: "news", imgText: "Student Press",
    title: "The Student Press and the Fight for Honest Reporting in Philippine Universities",
    author: "Rafael Magtibay", date: "September 10, 2025",
    body: `<p>In corridors where silence is often easier than speaking truth, a new generation of campus journalists is choosing the harder path. Across Philippine universities, student publications are pushing back against pressures — from administration, from funding shortfalls, and from the creeping normalization of self-censorship.</p><h3>The Pressure on Campus Media</h3><p>Many student publications receive funding directly from their universities, a dynamic that critics say creates an inherent conflict of interest. When a report exposes administrative misconduct, editors face the threat — sometimes implicit, sometimes explicit — of having their budget slashed or their publication suspended.</p><blockquote>"The truth doesn't have a price tag. But sometimes the institution tries to put one on it anyway."</blockquote><p>Despite these challenges, student journalists continue to file freedom of information requests, attend local government hearings, and hold campus officials accountable in ways that mainstream media sometimes cannot — precisely because they are embedded in the communities they cover.</p><h3>A Movement Finding Its Voice</h3><p>Organizations like the College Editors Guild of the Philippines (CEGP) have long championed the rights of student journalists, and their advocacy is growing louder. The Student Press Freedom bill has seen renewed momentum as media freedom becomes an increasingly prominent national conversation.</p>`
  },
  'identity': {
    category: "Editorial / Opinion", imgClass: "editorial", imgText: "Education",
    title: "We Are More Than Our Grades: A Plea for Holistic Education",
    author: "Maria Santos", date: "August 5, 2025",
    body: `<p>Every semester, Filipino students receive their grades — and with them, an invisible verdict on their worth. A 1.0 makes you remarkable. A 3.0 makes you invisible. Anything lower, and you risk becoming a cautionary tale whispered in hallways.</p><p>This is not education. This is a sorting machine.</p><h3>The Tyranny of the GWA</h3><p>The General Weighted Average has become the single most powerful number in a Filipino student's life. It determines scholarships, honor rolls, job applications, and in some families, the temperature of the dinner table. We have built an entire system of value around a decimal point.</p><blockquote>"A student who fails an exam but shows up every day, helps their classmates, and contributes meaningfully to their community is not a failed student. They are a human being navigating an imperfect system."</blockquote><p>But grades do not capture resilience. They do not measure the student who works a night shift to pay tuition, who cares for a sick parent between midterms, who fights through anxiety just to make it to class.</p><h3>What Holistic Education Demands</h3><p>True education must reckon with the whole person: their circumstances, their growth, their creativity, their emotional and social intelligence. Schools that incorporate portfolio assessments, project-based learning, and mentorship programs consistently produce graduates who are more adaptive, more empathetic, and more capable of sustained excellence.</p>`
  },
  'mural': {
    category: "Feature Article", imgClass: "culture", imgText: "The Wall",
    title: "The Wall Speaks: How Bulacan's Street Murals Tell a City's Untold Stories",
    author: "Janna Cruz", date: "July 19, 2025",
    body: `<p>On a crumbling wall along a side street in Malolos, a woman's face stares back at you. She is rendered in bold lines and earthy pigments — half portrait, half protest. She has been there for three years, weathering rain and exhaust and the slow indifference of passersby. Her name, if she has one, is unknown. But her story is the story of this city.</p><p>Street murals have become one of Bulacan's most quietly radical art forms. What began as scattered graffiti has evolved into an organized visual movement — one that documents history, challenges power, and insists on the visibility of the marginalized.</p><h3>Art as Archive</h3><p>"The walls remember things that official history forgets," says Lorenzo dela Paz, a visual artist and community organizer based in Meycauayan.</p><blockquote>"Every mural is an argument. It says: this community exists, these people matter, and this wall belongs to us."</blockquote><p>Some murals commemorate local heroes. Others depict the environmental degradation of Bulacan's rivers. Still others celebrate the vibrant folk traditions — the Obando Fertility Rites, the Pulilan Carabao Festival — that form the cultural backbone of the province.</p>`
  },
  'mental-health': {
    category: "Feature Article", imgClass: "opinion", imgText: "Mental Health",
    title: "Burnout Is Not a Badge of Honor: Mental Health in BSU's Broadcast Program",
    author: "Carl Reyes", date: "June 30, 2025",
    body: `<p>The broadcasting studio at Bulacan State University is busy at almost any hour. Students edit footage past midnight, rehearse scripts in hallways, and carry the weight of production deadlines alongside the ordinary pressures of academic life. From the outside, it looks like passion. From the inside, it often feels like survival.</p><h3>A Culture of Overwork</h3><p>The broadcast program's demands are real and documented. Students are required to produce, direct, and present radio and television content as part of their coursework — a rigorous training regimen designed to mirror professional standards.</p><blockquote>"We normalize exhaustion as dedication. But there is a difference between working hard and working in a way that hurts you."</blockquote><p>Faculty members acknowledge the pressure. Several professors interviewed for this piece expressed a desire for systemic change — more mental health resources, a counseling center that is actually staffed and accessible, a culture that allows students to say "I am not okay" without fear of academic consequence.</p><h3>Small Steps, Urgent Need</h3><p>BSU's Guidance and Counseling Office has expanded its drop-in hours and introduced peer support programs in recent semesters. But students say demand far outpaces supply, and the stigma around mental health remains a significant barrier. Burnout is not a badge of honor. It is a warning sign.</p>`
  },
  'campus-radio': {
    category: "News Writing", imgClass: "campus", imgText: "On Air",
    title: "Frequencies of Change: Inside BSU's Revived Campus Radio Station",
    author: "Lea Domingo", date: "May 15, 2025",
    body: `<p>For two years, the transmitter sat dormant. The studio — a small, foam-padded room on the third floor of BSU's Communication Arts building — collected dust and the faint memory of voices that once filled it. Then, last March, the ON AIR light flickered back to life.</p><p>BSU's campus radio station, Radio Aguman, has returned. And the students behind its revival say they have more to say than ever.</p><h3>Why It Went Silent</h3><p>The station's hiatus was the result of a combination of factors: equipment failure, administrative reorganization, and the disruptions wrought by the pandemic.</p><blockquote>"The moment we went live again, calls started coming in. People were listening. People had been waiting."</blockquote><h3>A New Generation of Broadcasters</h3><p>The revived station broadcasts three days a week, featuring news programming produced by students, music hours curated by different blocks, and a weekly public affairs program that invites local officials and community leaders to engage with the student audience. For many students, Radio Aguman is more than a course requirement. It is a training ground, a creative outlet, and a reminder of why they chose broadcasting in the first place.</p>`
  }
};

let previousPage = 'home';

function showPage(name) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-links a').forEach(a => a.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('page-' + name).classList.add('active');
  const navEl = document.getElementById('nav-' + name);
  if (navEl) navEl.classList.add('active');
  window.scrollTo(0, 0);
  previousPage = name;
}

function openArticle(id) {
  const a = articles[id];
  if (!a) return;
  document.getElementById('article-content').innerHTML = `
    <div class="article-category">${a.category}</div>
    <h1 class="article-title">${a.title}</h1>
    <div class="article-meta">
      <span class="article-meta-author">${a.author}</span>
      <div class="article-meta-dot"></div>
      <span class="article-meta-date">${a.date}</span>
    </div>
    <div class="article-header-img ${a.imgClass}">${a.imgText}</div>
    <div class="article-body">${a.body}</div>`;
  document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('page-article').classList.add('active');
  window.scrollTo(0, 0);
}

function goBack() { showPage('works'); }

function filterWorks(cat, btn) {
  document.querySelectorAll('#works-grid .article-card').forEach(card => {
    card.style.display = (cat === 'all' || card.dataset.category === cat) ? 'flex' : 'none';
  });
  if (btn) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.cat-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
    btn.classList.add('active');
  }
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
